texto: If "doctor" means "master teacher," then I think teaching in K-12 for 10 years deserves said title. Our practicum is potent and our expertise is in the service of children. In fact, I might start calling myself Dr. Vilson on principle. Fight me
explicacao: Citação de Jose Luis Vilson sobre temas ligados a educacao. “If "doctor" means "master teacher," then I think teaching in K-12 for 10 years deserves said titl…” articula educacao, education, reflexao em registro de educacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
